description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black and tan color scheme. The stock is adjustable and made of polymer, providing ergonomic support and a textured buttpad for stability. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, with the barrel extending in a straight, unadorned fashion and ending in a simple muzzle device. The pistol grip is contoured for comfort and control, and a detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver. The rifle lacks any advanced optics, instead featuring basic iron sights integrated into the top rail. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, tan and black tactical rifle with an adjustable stock, metal barrel, and detachable box magazine. Features basic iron sights and a robust, ergonomic design.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the rear, highlighting the textured buttpad and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_1: A left-side profile view shows the adjustable stock, pistol grip, magazine, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the front, emphasizing the muzzle, barrel, and the symmetry of the handguard.
description_view_3: A right-side profile view displays the stock, grip, magazine, and barrel, mirroring the left side but with subtle differences in lighting and detail.
